feedback.text: "Don't be evil" the famous slogan for Android parent company Google or Alphabet what they call themselves now, and we all know that they have gone above and beyond to break this slogan actually now they take special care to never reveal that they ever had this in the first place. They are trying to close down Android and make it an iOS clone, already there are too many restirctions and even though they say it is still open source, the code for any drivers are not avaialble so it is almost impossbile for not so tech savy person to build there own version of Android. What they are doing now, removing the ability or walling the ability of sideloading apps on the grounds of security is bullshit, almost exclusively a majority of the security flaws in Android were distributed via play store.
